theme: The Skill Shelf — Skill System Restructuring

shots.title: Restructure sprint-workflow and performance-analysis skills

hazards.description: [code review] 5 API shape errors in JS snippets: area.modules, generateTrainingPlan fields, recommendReviews flags, card.rolling.last5, HandicapCard scalar assumption
[architect review] VALID_STEP_TYPES duplicated between workflow.ts parser and workflow-validator.ts. Should export from one location.

shots.notes: Moved both skills from /skills/ to .claude/skills/ with folder structure

shots.title: Enhance loop-guide with gotchas and expanded references

hazards.description: [architect review] Wrong model name (MiniMax M2.5) and stale version pin (v1.13.1) in loop-guide

shots.notes: Added gotchas.md, model-tier-rules.md, error-recovery.md; slimmed SKILL.md

shots.title: Create SLOPE API reference skill

hazards.description: [code review] SQLite recordStepResult has race condition: read-modify-write on completed_steps JSON not wrapped in transaction. PG version uses atomic jsonb append.
[code review] started_at and completed_at always identical in step results - started_at is misleading since it records completion time, not actual start.

shots.notes: New skill with 12 MCP gotchas, tool schemas, execute cookbook, search guide

shots.title: Update references and run validation

hazards.description: [code review] WorkflowAdapter.status getter returns stale cached value after fail(). Local execution object never updated by mutation methods.

shots.notes: Deleted old /skills/, regenerated CODEBASE.md, build+test+typecheck clean
